notes: AMS reported 262,061,101,077 collected cosmic-ray events on its official mission page.

source: AMS publication: The Origin of Lithium Isotopes in Cosmic Rays
notes: AMS reported about 9.7e5 6Li and 1.04e6 7Li nuclei collected from May 2011 to October 2023.

source: arXiv: Galactic cosmic ray experience of NIRSpec in the first three years of JWST operations at L2
notes: The paper reports a current GCR hit rate near 2.3 ions cm^-2 s^-1 and forecasts ~4.3 by early 2027 as solar modulation declines.

source: ESA cosmic ray simulator for deep-space radiation reproduction
notes: ESA reported charged atoms accelerated to around 90% of the speed of light to reproduce the deep-space cosmic-ray spectrum.
